LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC's motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. No opposition filed. Midland is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Freddy Martinez in the principal amount of $11,498.75. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
